expr: rank(group_neutralize(add(add(multiply(0.35, ts_zscore(ts_backfill(return_equity, 252), 252)), multiply(0.35, ts_zscore(ts_backfill(return_on_assets, 252), 252))), add(multiply(0.15, ts_zscore(ts_backfill(gross_profit_assets, 252), 252)), multiply(0.15, ts_zscore(ts_backfill(asset_turnover, 252), 252)))), industry)) * rank(reverse(ts_mean(returns, 20)))

trade_when(rank(ts_std_dev(returns, 20)) > 0.25, rank(group_neutralize(add(multiply(0.5, ts_zscore(ts_backfill(gross_margin, 252), 252)), multiply(0.5, ts_zscore(ts_backfill(fcf_assets, 252), 252))), industry)) * rank(reverse(ts_mean(returns, 7))), -1)

rank(group_neutralize(add(multiply(0.5, ts_av_diff(ts_backfill(return_equity, 252), 126)), multiply(0.5, ts_av_diff(ts_backfill(return_on_assets, 252), 126))), industry)) * rank(reverse(ts_mean(returns, 6)))

trade_when(and(rank(ts_mean(volume, 20)) > 0.2, rank(ts_std_dev(returns, 20)) > 0.2), hump(rank(group_neutralize(add(multiply(0.55, ts_zscore(ts_backfill(fcf_assets, 252), 252)), multiply(0.45, ts_zscore(ts_backfill(gross_margin, 252), 252))), industry)) * rank(reverse(ts_mean(returns, 5))), 0.015), -1)

scale(rank(group_neutralize(add(add(multiply(0.25, ts_zscore(ts_backfill(return_equity, 252), 252)), multiply(0.25, ts_zscore(ts_backfill(return_on_assets, 252), 252))), add(add(multiply(0.2, ts_zscore(ts_backfill(gross_profit_assets, 252), 252)), multiply(0.15, ts_zscore(ts_backfill(fcf_assets, 252), 252))), multiply(0.15, ts_zscore(ts_backfill(asset_turnover, 252), 252)))), subindustry)) * rank(reverse(ts_mean(returns, 9))))
